_doc: Single-card serial job queue (1x A40). Driver: python scripts/queue {list|next|run|reset|mark} or bash scripts/run_queue_all.sh. fields: name, cmd(shell str), priority(higher=earlier), est_min, deps[], status(pending|running|done|failed), note. Commit on checkpoints. | P3-step-1: refined num_running controller + max-tokens=32 Pareto re-validation.

jobs.name: smoke-dummy
jobs.cmd: python scripts/_dummy.py
jobs.note: P0 queue mechanism smoke test (no GPU, no torch dep)

jobs.name: env-smoke
jobs.cmd: /home/dell/miniconda3/envs/vtc/bin/python -c "import torch,transformers,accelerate,PIL; print('vtc OK', torch.__version__, torch.cuda.is_available())"
jobs.note: Verify vtc env post-build (queued; run after build_env.sh completes)

jobs.name: p1-lit-survey
jobs.cmd: echo 'NOT A GPU JOB: P1 lit-survey driven by Lit subagent -> notes/lit-survey.md. Mark done manually.'
jobs.note: subagent-driven; do not run via queue

jobs.name: probe_gqa_r0
jobs.cmd: /home/dell/miniconda3/envs/vtc_serve/bin/python -m src.serve_bench --model runs/models/llava-1.5-7b-hf --pruning-rate 0.0 --benchmark gqa --subset eval/subsets/gqa_200.jsonl --metrics-out runs/p2_probe/gqa_r0_metrics.json --max-tokens 32 --max-model-len 4096 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.90 --seed 0
jobs.note: Go/no-go CONTROL on GQA (r=0). Denominator for all GQA speedup ratios. PIPELINE VALIDATION: confirms model loads in vLLM + subset parses + inference runs + metrics written.

jobs.name: probe_gqa_r50

jobs.note: GQA at 50% prune (keep 288/576). HOOK VALIDATION + THE GATE POINT: GO needs >=1.5x prefill speedup & >=1.2x e2e req/s & <=2% acc drop vs r0.

jobs.name: probe_gqa_r25

jobs.note: GQA at 25% prune (keep 432/576). Curve point.

jobs.name: v1_probe_gqa_r0
jobs.cmd: /home/dell/miniconda3/envs/vtc_serve/bin/python -m src.serve_bench --model runs/models/llava-1.5-7b-hf --pruning-rate 0.0 --selector true_cls --benchmark gqa --subset eval/subsets/gqa_200.jsonl --metrics-out runs/p2_probe_v1/gqa_r0_metrics.json --max-tokens 32 --max-model-len 4096 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.90 --seed 0
jobs.note: v1 TRUE-CLS-attn selector CONTROL on GQA (r=0). At r=0 the selector is a no-op (control), so this is byte-identical to the proxy r=0 baseline -- we re-run it as the speedup denominator FOR THE v1 SERIES so speedup ratios are computed within one selector family (avoids conflating selector change with prune-rate change). Note: r0 metrics SHOULD match the proxy probe's gqa_r0 within noise (sanity check).

jobs.name: v1_probe_gqa_r25
jobs.cmd: /home/dell/miniconda3/envs/vtc_serve/bin/python -m src.serve_bench --model runs/models/llava-1.5-7b-hf --pruning-rate 0.25 --selector true_cls --benchmark gqa --subset eval/subsets/gqa_200.jsonl --metrics-out runs/p2_probe_v1/gqa_r25_metrics.json --max-tokens 32 --max-model-len 4096 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.90 --seed 0
jobs.note: v1 GQA @ 25% prune (keep 432/576), REAL [CLS]->patch attn selector (diversity OFF, lam=0 -- the FasterVLM/VTC-CLS setting). PRIMARY accuracy comparison point vs proxy probe r25 (acc 0.555, -3.0%): expect true CLS-attn to tighten the drop.

jobs.name: v1_probe_gqa_r50
jobs.cmd: /home/dell/miniconda3/envs/vtc_serve/bin/python -m src.serve_bench --model runs/models/llava-1.5-7b-hf --pruning-rate 0.50 --selector true_cls --benchmark gqa --subset eval/subsets/gqa_200.jsonl --metrics-out runs/p2_probe_v1/gqa_r50_metrics.json --max-tokens 32 --max-model-len 4096 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.90 --seed 0
jobs.note: v1 GQA @ 50% prune (keep 288/576), REAL CLS-attn. THE GATE POINT for the v1 selector: proxy r50 was 0.565 (-2.0%); v1 should improve accuracy at iso-throughput (the throughput numbers should match the proxy r50 within noise -- same hook, same KV-cache win -- confirming the serving win is selector-agnostic, the accuracy is not).

jobs.name: v1_probe_gqa_r75
jobs.cmd: /home/dell/miniconda3/envs/vtc_serve/bin/python -m src.serve_bench --model runs/models/llava-1.5-7b-hf --pruning-rate 0.75 --selector true_cls --benchmark gqa --subset eval/subsets/gqa_200.jsonl --metrics-out runs/p2_probe_v1/gqa_r75_metrics.json --max-tokens 32 --max-model-len 4096 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.90 --seed 0
jobs.note: v1 GQA @ 75% prune (keep 144/576), REAL CLS-attn. Stress point: proxy r75 was 0.470 (-11.5%, the steep-drop region). True CLS-attn should recover meaningful accuracy here -- if it brings r75 to within ~6% of r0, the v1 method's accuracy story is strong and we can argue the proxy UNDERSTATED the method.

jobs.name: v1_probe_textvqa_r0

jobs.note: v1 TRUE-CLS CONTROL on TextVQA (r=0). OCR-heavy denominator for the v1 TextVQA series.

jobs.name: v1_probe_textvqa_r50
jobs.cmd: /home/dell/miniconda3/envs/vtc_serve/bin/python -m src.serve_bench --model runs/models/llava-1.5-7b-hf --pruning-rate 0.50 --selector true_cls --benchmark textvqa --subset eval/subsets/textvqa_200.jsonl --metrics-out runs/p2_probe_v1/textvqa_r50_metrics.json --max-tokens 32 --max-model-len 4096 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.90 --seed 0
jobs.note: v1 TextVQA @ 50% prune, REAL CLS-attn. OCR robustness gate for v1: proxy r50 was 0.530 (-2.5%, passed the <=5% gate). Expect v1 to hold or improve. This is the key OCR-degradation-resistance data point.

jobs.name: v1_probe_textvqa_r75
jobs.cmd: /home/dell/miniconda3/envs/vtc_serve/bin/python -m src.serve_bench --model runs/models/llava-1.5-7b-hf --pruning-rate 0.75 --selector true_cls --benchmark textvqa --subset eval/subsets/textvqa_200.jsonl --metrics-out runs/p2_probe_v1/textvqa_r75_metrics.json --max-tokens 32 --max-model-len 4096 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.90 --seed 0
jobs.note: v1 TextVQA @ 75% prune, REAL CLS-attn. Proxy r75 was 0.440 (-11.5%). The OCR stress test -- if true CLS-attn (which prioritizes text-region patches) recovers accuracy here, it directly demonstrates selector quality matters for OCR-heavy workloads.

jobs.name: fastv_gqa_control
jobs.cmd: /home/dell/miniconda3/envs/fastv/bin/python -m src.fastv_bench --model-path /media/disk2/YZX/doct/FastV/llava-v1.5-7b --benchmark gqa --subset eval/subsets/gqa_200.jsonl --keep-tokens 576 --agg-layer 2 --metrics-out runs/fastv_baseline/gqa_control_metrics.json --max-tokens 32 --device cuda
jobs.note: FastV ACCURACY-ONLY control on GQA (keep-tokens=576 => FastV OFF). The no-prune LLaVA-1.5-7B baseline via the FastV repo's llava lib (same env path as pruned runs -> identical tokenizer/preprocessing). Sanity check: this should match the vLLM r0 GQA acc (~0.585) within +/-2% (the two paths differ only in attn impl: fastv env uses eager+patched, vLLM uses SDPA; small numeric diffs expected). If it diverges >5%, flag a scorer/preprocess mismatch before trusting pruned numbers.

jobs.name: fastv_gqa_r50
jobs.cmd: /home/dell/miniconda3/envs/fastv/bin/python -m src.fastv_bench --model-path /media/disk2/YZX/doct/FastV/llava-v1.5-7b --benchmark gqa --subset eval/subsets/gqa_200.jsonl --keep-tokens 288 --agg-layer 2 --metrics-out runs/fastv_baseline/gqa_r50_metrics.json --max-tokens 32 --device cuda
jobs.note: FastV @ r50 (keep 288/576) on GQA. THE ACCURACY ANCHOR: this is the canonical TF compressor at 50% prune. Compare to (a) proxy probe r50 (0.565, -2.0%) and (b) v1 true_cls r50 (to be run). FastV prunes INTRA-LLM at layer 2 (attention-rank on the last decode token) -- a DIFFERENT mechanism from boundary CLS-attn -- so it sets the bar our boundary method should approach/match at iso-budget. Published FastV GQA at ~50% prune is ~60% on full val (we're on a 200-subset, expect noise).

jobs.name: fastv_gqa_r75
jobs.cmd: /home/dell/miniconda3/envs/fastv/bin/python -m src.fastv_bench --model-path /media/disk2/YZX/doct/FastV/llava-v1.5-7b --benchmark gqa --subset eval/subsets/gqa_200.jsonl --keep-tokens 144 --agg-layer 2 --metrics-out runs/fastv_baseline/gqa_r75_metrics.json --max-tokens 32 --device cuda
jobs.note: FastV @ r75 (keep 144/576) on GQA. The high-prune anchor. Compare to proxy r75 (0.470, -11.5%) -- FastV's intra-LLM attention-rank should degrade more gracefully here than boundary CLS-attn at extreme prune (this is FastV's known strength). If our v1 true_cls r75 approaches FastV r75, that's a strong result (boundary method matching intra-LLM method at extreme budget).

jobs.name: fastv_textvqa_r50
jobs.cmd: /home/dell/miniconda3/envs/fastv/bin/python -m src.fastv_bench --model-path /media/disk2/YZX/doct/FastV/llava-v1.5-7b --benchmark textvqa --subset eval/subsets/textvqa_200.jsonl --keep-tokens 288 --agg-layer 2 --metrics-out runs/fastv_baseline/textvqa_r50_metrics.json --max-tokens 32 --device cuda
jobs.note: FastV @ r50 on TextVQA. OCR-robustness anchor: proxy r50 was 0.530 (-2.5%). FastV is known to degrade on OCR at high prune -- this characterizes whether intra-LLM pruning preserves text-region tokens better than boundary CLS-attn. The OCR comparison (FastV vs v1 true_cls) is a key table row.
